computed.name: PA.01 Portfolio Manager Approval
PE_UNDERSIGNED_TEXT
PE_COLLECTIVELY_TEXT
PE_INVESTMENT_COMMITTEE_TEXT
computed.formula:
var newText = "Based on a review of the Investment Committee Presentation, the Investment Committee approval and any other factors considered relevant by the undersigned, as a registered Advising Representative  of Northleaf Capital Partners (Canada) Ltd., the general partner, administrative partner, and/or manager of the Funds, the undersigned hereby authorizes the making of the Investment by the Funds.";
return newText;
